package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for api_examples_embedded_in_handlers_instead_of_transport_docs_helpers: Long example payload blocks hardcoded in handlers rather than doc or example helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule002NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule002NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule002NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario002Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule002NegativeService, input Rule002NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
